summary: Plan-only inventory classification for 40 hydrated open PRs. No canonical selected. Two PRs with explicit secret/sensitive-data exposure claims are routed to central security handling; all other PRs are kept independently for maintainer review. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or PR creation is planned.

actions.reason: PR body claims secret-bearing service environment values can be captured from status output, so this exact PR is security-sensitive.
PR body claims Gmail watch tokens can be exposed via process argv/procfs, so this exact PR is security-sensitive.
